message:
fix(gateway): fix bugs found during code review

- Fix WebSocket URL generation: use helper that handles https→wss correctly
- Add safeParseInt helper to handle NaN from invalid query params
- Fix type annotations: use Hono Context and ContentfulStatusCode types
- Remove unused variable in map callback
- Fix drizzle logger type: use false instead of undefined
- Fix health check driver status type

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.5 <noreply@anthropic.com>
